visual_dna.composition: Centered layout with high-tech elements and space motifs
visual_dna.palette: Space blue (#004C97) 50%, White 30%, with red accents

strategic_analysis.audience: Space enthusiasts, all ages, technology admirers

image_composition_analysis.focal_points: Primary focus on 'Artemis' logo and QR code; secondary focus on moon illustration
image_composition_analysis.typography_style: Clean sans-serif, easy readability, structured organization

source_analysis.prompt_reconstruction: Futuristic space-themed digital pass, focus on Artemis logo, flat lighting, prominent blue and white color scheme, technological and branded composition, NASA style --ar 16:9 --style digital

subjects.description: space mission pass with prominent Artemis branding

video_prompt_json.camera: slow zoom into the QR code
video_prompt_json.movement: pulsating light on QR code, dynamic information transitions
